Philosophy

Not real estate videos.
Stories.

A house is never just walls and windows. It's morning light falling on hardwood. A door that remembers every arrival. Corners where time has settled.

I approach every space the way a filmmaker approaches a character — with curiosity, patience, and the belief that every space has a story worth telling slowly.

This isn't marketing. It's memory-making.

— Mohit, Director, Frame x Frame
"Every space has a story worth telling slowly."

"Watched by half a million people across the world."

From the Himalayas to living rooms in New York, London, Dubai, and Sydney — Frame x Frame's audience spans every continent.

Our Mission

Finding the homes
the world never knew
existed.

A platform that seeks, films, and tells the stories of India's most extraordinary spaces.

What We Are Building

A platform that finds extraordinary homes and tells the world their stories.

India has millions of homes. But a very small number are truly extraordinary — homes with history, with soul, with architecture that took decades of intention to create.

These homes exist. Most are invisible. Frame x Frame's mission is to change that — to travel across India, find these homes, and create cinematic films that bring them to a global audience. Free. Forever.

Why It Matters

Our audience is not just Indian. It is global.

Our films are watched by people in the USA, UK, Europe, Australia, UAE, and Southeast Asia — people who love architecture, who dream of living differently, who are searching for something real.

We give them that. A real home. A real story. Told with cinema. And in doing so we create a living archive of India's most extraordinary homes — accessible to anyone, anywhere, forever.

Our Three Pillars
Find
Seek the Extraordinary
We travel across India to find homes that are truly remarkable — not the biggest or most expensive, but the most interesting. Homes with a story worth telling.
Film
Tell It With Cinema
We document each space with the patience of a documentary filmmaker. Long takes. Natural light. Real conversations. No scripts. No staging. No rush.
Share
Show the World
We publish every film on YouTube — free, for everyone, forever. Our growing audience spans India, USA, UK, Europe, UAE, Australia and Southeast Asia.

"Every extraordinary home deserves to be seen."

Building the definitive cinematic archive of India's most remarkable homes — one film at a time.

The Craft

How We Film

Patience, cinema, and an obsession with getting it right.

Our Approach

We don't shoot properties.
We document lives.

Before we film anything, we spend time in the space. We walk through it in the morning. We sit in it at noon. We watch the light change in the evening. We talk to the people who live there — not for an interview, but to understand the story.

Only then do we pick up the camera. This is why our films feel different. They don't look like house tours. They look like small documentaries about a place and the people who made it.

— Mohit, Director
"We sit in every space before we film it. We listen before we look."
The Process

From First Contact to Final Film

01
Selection
We personally review every space submitted. We only film homes we genuinely believe have an extraordinary story — not every home qualifies.
02
Research
Before the shoot we research the home's history, the architect, the materials — everything that will form the narrative of the film.
03
Production
We spend 1–2 full days at the location. We film at different times of day. We wait for the right light. We never rush the camera.
04
Post-Production
Editing takes weeks. We craft the narrative, pacing, colour, and sound — until the film truly feels like cinema, not a walkthrough.
What Makes Us Different

The Craft Behind Every Film

🎬
Cinematic Shooting
Professional cinema cameras and lenses. Every shot composed like a frame in a film — not a property listing or a walkthrough.
☀
Natural Light Only
We never use artificial lighting rigs. Every film is lit by the sun and the space itself — because that's how real life looks.
🎵
Original Soundscapes
We record the sounds of every space — wind, birds, creaking wood, rain on a tin roof. Audio is as important as visuals.
📖
Story-First Editing
The film is built around a narrative arc — a beginning, a mood, a revelation. Not a room-by-room walkthrough.
⏱
Long Form
Our films are 10–25 minutes. Long enough to make you feel like you've actually been to the place.
🌏
Global Reach
Published on YouTube — optimised for a global audience. Titles and thumbnails designed to travel far beyond India.
Our Audience

500K+ views. Every corner of the world.

Our films don't just reach India. Every film crosses borders — watched by NRIs in London, architects in New York, design lovers in Dubai, and travellers across Southeast Asia.

Open Call

Feature
Your Space

We film extraordinary homes across India. Is yours next?

Why Feature With Us

Your space. Our camera. A global audience.

Frame x Frame creates cinematic documentary films about extraordinary homes across India. We don't make promotional videos — we make films that capture the soul of a space, the light, the texture, and the story behind every corner.

When you feature your space, your film is published on our YouTube channel — watched by 500K+ viewers from India, USA, UK, Europe, Australia, UAE and beyond. Your home gets seen by the world, free, forever.

Every film averages 50,000+ views. Our audience is global, engaged, and passionate about architecture.

Filming involves a fee. Full details shared after we review and select your submission.

This isn't marketing.
It's memory-making.

Every space we film becomes part of a permanent archive of India's most remarkable homes — free to watch, forever, by anyone in the world. Your home will be documented with the craft and care it deserves.

Who We Film

What Kind of Spaces

⛰
Mountain & Himalayan Homes
Homes in the hills of Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand and beyond — where architecture meets altitude and silence.
🏛
Heritage & Old Homes
Colonial bungalows, ancestral havelis, century-old cottages — spaces that carry history in every wall and beam.
◻
Modern Architecture
Thoughtfully designed contemporary homes where architecture, material, and landscape come together beautifully.
🏨
Hotels & Resorts
Boutique hotels, jungle lodges, and mountain resorts with a story beyond their amenities list.
🌿
Forest & Nature Retreats
Off-grid homes, forest cottages, and homestays that live in harmony with the natural world.
✦
Any Extraordinary Space
If your space has character, history, soul — or an unusual way of being — we want to hear about it.
The Process

How It Happens

01
You Submit
Fill the form below. Tell us about your space — its story, character, location, and what makes it extraordinary.
02
We Review
Mohit personally reviews every submission and responds within 7 working days if your space is selected.
03
We Film
We visit, spend real time in your space, and shoot a cinematic documentary over 1–2 full days.
04
The World Sees It
Your film goes live on the Frame x Frame YouTube channel — reaching 500K+ viewers across the world. Free. Forever.

Submit Your Space

Tell us your story. We'll be in touch.

Filming involves a fee — details shared after selection. We review every submission personally. If selected, we'll reach out within 7 working days.
✓ Submitted! Mohit will review it and be in touch within 7 working days if your space is selected.

About Frame x Frame

We document
what others
walk past.

A cinematic platform for India's most extraordinary homes.

The Platform

Built on the belief that every space has a story.

Frame x Frame began with a simple conviction: the most extraordinary homes in India were not being seen. Photography couldn't capture the feel of a space. Words couldn't convey the silence of a Himalayan morning or the warmth of a 100-year-old cottage in the hills.

So Mohit began filming — not as a commercial service, but as a storyteller. One space at a time. One story at a time. With patience and with cinema.

Today Frame x Frame reaches half a million viewers across India, USA, UK, Europe, Australia, UAE, and Southeast Asia.

— Mohit, Director, Frame x Frame
"Not real estate videos. Stories."
What We Stand For

Our Values

01
Cinema First
Every film is made with the patience of a documentary filmmaker — not the speed of a commercial videographer.
02
Stories Over Sales
We document spaces because they deserve to be documented. Not to sell them. To remember them. Permanently.
03
Slow Work
We spend time in every space before we film it. We listen, observe, and understand before we interpret.
04
India's Homes
From Himalayan cottages to Rajasthani havelis — building a definitive cinematic archive of India's beautiful spaces.
05
Long Form
Our films are 10–25 minutes. A space worth experiencing is worth more than 60 seconds of footage.
06
One Voice
Frame x Frame is Mohit's editorial vision. Every space is chosen personally. Nothing is random.

"All films made with patience."

On a mission to document the most extraordinary homes across India — and show them to the world.
